acceptance_targets: [CH06-BOOKER-001] PASS if, in revised snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:194-255, a reader can identify one explicit dead end after the analog search and one new leverage point that becomes available only by contacting Mara; FAIL if Lena still resolves both parcel linkage and practical next move before outside help.

[CH06-CRAFT-001] PASS if revised snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:133-145 contains at least one concrete, on-page consequence after "We're not fine" (e.g., changed plan, refused contact, explicit boundary) that alters what follows; FAIL if the passage still bridges by summary language without a new enacted consequence.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, in revised snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:194-255, a reader can identify one explicit dead end after the analog search and one new leverage point that becomes available only by contacting Mara; FAIL if Lena still resolves both parcel linkage and practical next move before outside help.
findings.problem: The chapter frames county records access as a hard institutional blockade, but Lena still reaches a major tract linkage in one uninterrupted home pass, so the obstacle reads more atmospheric than causally constraining. This weakens escalation and makes the end-of-chapter ask to Mara feel less forced than it should.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the investigation sequence across snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:194-207 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:252-255 so one critical link remains unobtainable after Lena's analog search. Add a concrete failed step in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:194-207 (for example, ambiguous parcel ownership or missing transfer page) that directly triggers the Mara outreach in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:252-255.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:133-145 contains at least one concrete, on-page consequence after "We're not fine" (e.g., changed plan, refused contact, explicit boundary) that alters what follows; FAIL if the passage still bridges by summary language without a new enacted consequence.
findings.problem: Timidity: after the chapter's sharpest family-pressure admission ("We're not fine"), the narrative retreats into summary ("Conversation limped after that") instead of rendering the immediate interpersonal damage beat-by-beat. That softens the stated cost of Lena's choice.
findings.rewrite_direction: Replace the summary transition in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:141-143 with a fully dramatized aftermath beat that includes direct action or speech from Jalen and/or Marcus before the custody warning in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:145. Keep the same scene and time; do not jump ahead until a specific behavioral consequence is shown.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When edge cases arise, choose the version that preserves uncomfortable specificity and character accountability; do not replace difficult scenes with procedural summary, and do not mute class, race, sexuality, or institutional cruelty when those forces are actively shaping choices.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene with violence, racism, grief, or moral compromise is rendered in abstract or polite shorthand, revise to restore specific bodily, social, and material consequence before accepting the draft.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the baseline in contemporary Mississippi speech; uncontracted forms are reserved for formality, emphasis, or social performance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: rotate structural textures across chapters: procedural surge, quiet domestic interval, document-driven slow burn, dread preparation, aftermath inventory, and information-turn chapters; avoid repeating scene count plus dialogue density pattern in adjacent chapters.
prose_style_profile.diction: literary but grounded; precise legal and forensic terms when needed, balanced by lived vernacular and local material detail.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person anchored primarily to Lena, with brief controlled expansions only when factual clarity requires it.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternate compressed procedural sentences with longer sensory-emotional lines so pressure and reflection keep rebalancing.
